title: Composite collection of Finger Millet.
abstract:
Finger millet (Eleusine coracana (L.) Gaertn), belongs to genus Eleusine in the tribe Eragrostideae
family Poaceae (Gramineae), and subfamily Chloridoideae, self pollinating, ranks fourth in
importance among millets in the world after sorghum, pearl millet, and foxtail millet. It is a
tetraploid species with 2n=36, and self pollinating................
